meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Project Management for Freelancers: Overcome Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Master project management to eliminate slow dev speed. A beginner's guide to using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development speed, transition from ad-hoc coding to structured project management using AI-orchestration. By integrating Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for CLI-based implementation, you can automate boilerplate, enforce consistent patterns, and ship production-ready features 5x faster than traditional manual workflows.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client is asking for an update, and you’re stuck in a labyrinth of debugging and context switching. Every freelancer knows the crushing weight of 'slow development speed'—that invisible friction that turns a three-day project into a two-week marathon of frustration and diminishing margins.

You don’t need more hours; you need a system. By treating your development lifecycle as a managed product rather than a series of tasks, you reclaim your agency. This case study dismantles the chaos, replacing manual toil with an AI-augmented workflow that transforms your terminal into a high-velocity engine.

steps.title: Define Project Scope with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to structure your project requirements, tech stack, and milestone roadmap to avoid scope creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level project architecture for a SaaS landing page with Stripe integration. Define the folder structure, core dependencies, and a 3-phase milestone plan.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop typing repetitive setup code. Use Claude Code to scaffold your project based on the Antigravity architecture document.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a detailed manifest of the necessary files and boilerplate code for the project defined in step 1.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Generate the file structure and base controllers based on the manifest provided by Antigravity."

steps.title: Implement Feature Modules
steps.description: Break down large tasks into atomic units. Use Claude Code to write individual modules while maintaining strict type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical specification for an authentication module using NextAuth and Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Build the authentication module following the spec. Ensure all components are modular and exported correctly."

steps.title: Automated Code Review & Refactoring
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan for technical debt and optimize your logic before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest refactoring patterns for better maintainability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Review the /src directory and refactor for performance and readability, following best practices for React."

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Sync
steps.description: Finalize the build and verify your CI/CD pipeline configuration to ensure seamless delivery to your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a deployment checklist for a Vercel-hosted Next.js application including environment variable management.
steps.claude_code_command: claude "Verify my deployment configuration and prepare the project for production build."

pro_tips: Always maintain a single 'Source of Truth' file in Antigravity to keep your AI agents aligned on project goals.
Use Claude Code's --watch mode during development to catch errors in real-time as you modify logic.
Tag your Git commits with AI-generated summaries to make client-facing changelogs effortless.
Create a 'Custom Persona' file for Claude Code that includes your preferred coding style and library choices.
Batch your AI requests; perform all architectural changes in one session to minimize context window drift.
content.next_steps: After completing your first project, audit your performance metrics. Compare your 'Time to First Commit' and 'Total Development Hours' against your previous manual workflows to quantify your newfound efficiency.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start mastering them. By integrating these AI-driven workflows, you'll stop being a code-monkey and start acting like a high-leverage technical architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
